body:
One task for debugging the dycore is to check the BCs. This PR adds an iterator over `Field` & `FieldVector`s so that we can more easily iterate over these fields (for plotting).

This PR is basically adding the ClimaCore version of ClimateMachine's `flattened_tup_chain`.

The user-facing components here are `property_chains` and `single_field`.
title: Add flattened iterators over field & fieldvector variables
